commands.repair_reason: - [P2] This member-authored draft needs maintainer judgment on the privileged MultiCodex service boundary before automation should edit or merge it.; Needs attention: The diff is security-sensitive because the dedicated MultiCodex token can authorize room creation/supervision and trigger deployment-token branch preparation.; Review finding: [P3] Remove the release-owned changelog edit — CHANGELOG.md:5-7 (sha=6bbc0e7047c36ad2b219790fb3e7e0f93402ace9)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds OpenClaw room-scoped crabbox create/read/transcript/message/stop APIs, a dedicated MultiCodex bearer token, service branch-preparation logic, docs, and helper tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR review concerns by source inspection: the latest head still edits CHANGELOG.md and the new room service gate accepts CRABBOX_MULTICODEX_TOKEN for privileged endpoints. No live service repro was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This member-authored draft needs maintainer judgment on the privileged MultiCodex service boundary before automation should edit or merge it.

target.title: feat(api): add room-scoped crabbox supervision
target.body:
## Summary

- add root-fenced OpenClaw service reads for Crabbox room trees
- add bounded transcript evidence, targeted PTY nudges, audited stop, and canonical browser URLs
- document and test the supervision contract for MultiCodex

## Validation

- `pnpm test` (182 passed)
- `pnpm exec tsgo --noEmit`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/index.ts src/openclaw-service.ts tests/openclaw-service.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

`pnpm check` reaches the repo-wide formatter gate, which is currently red on 70 untouched baseline files with the installed formatter; no formatter churn is included here.
target.author: vincentkoc
